'''Akkik''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] living on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. During this time, he collected protection money from local businesses for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. He was protected by [[Gorrt]] the [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]]. He was also known to have encountered the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] that went to rescue [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]].

==Biography==
Akkik was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jawa/Legends|Jawa]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="GG7" /> Leaving his [[Sandcrawler/Legends|sandcrawler]] behind,<ref name="TM-CA3">{{WEGCite|story=Tatooine Manhunt|book=Classic Adventures: Volume Three}}</ref> Akkik headed for [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], where he gained a reputation for being a nasty individual<ref name="GG7" /> engaged in numerous dubious trades.<ref name="TM-CA3" /> His exploits soon brought him to the attention one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt's]] guards. The guard proposed that Akkik join the guards and Jabba agreed after fired the guard to make room for the Jawa. Akkik agreed to work for Jabba for as long as the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] contined to feed him.<ref name="GG7" />

While working for Jabba, Akkik somehow befriended one of his [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards, [[Gorrt]], and managed to persuade him to be his protector.<ref name="TM-CA3" /> The pair worked in Mos Eisley collecting protection from storeowners such as [[Tar Lup|Tar]] and [[Kal Lup]]. The two were in [[Lup's Wares and Supplies]] collecting protection money the same [[Standard day/Legends|day]] that [[operative]]s of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] were [[Escape from Tatooine|looking]] for information on the whereabouts of [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]].<ref name="TM" />

==Personality and traits==
Akkik was a covetous and tricky coward with a nasty streak. He talked a lot, but he was not bothered by the fact that no one could understand him. Akkik wore a heavy hooded [[Cloak/Legends|cloak]] that concealed his small body and smelled badly.<ref name="GG7" /> He was a thoroughly untrustworthy individual.<ref name="TM-CA3" /> Akkik carried a [[Ion blaster/Legends|ion blaster]].<ref name="DB">{{DB|character|akkik|Akkik}}</ref>
